== Notes for [[Item:Q105683|Q105683]] ==

From ''Banu Tamim'' Tribe.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamimi

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Tamim

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamim

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ad-Darimi

Source 5: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ali

Source 6: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Ali

Source 7: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Leila_bint_Masoud

Source 8: http://www.balaghah.net/books/imam_ali/body_family_of_i1.html

Source 9: http://www.janathimessage.co.uk/AskTheImam/askimama.asp?qno=465

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008717791464

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
